name: scheduled-pipeline-scan
description: Automated cron-scheduled PipeWarden security scans with Slack notifications for critical findings
author: OpenClaw

schedule.description: Run at specified schedule. Use presets or custom cron expression.

tools.name: pipewarden-client
tools.description: Connect to PipeWarden API for pipeline security scanning

tools.name: slack-notifier
tools.description: Send Slack messages with findings and mobile push notifications

tools.name: webhook-dispatcher
tools.description: Dispatch webhooks to connected CI/CD platforms

schedule_preset.description: Schedule preset: hourly, daily, daily-evening, weekdays, weekly, twice-daily, or custom cron

custom_cron.description: Custom cron expression (used only if schedule_preset=custom)

connection_id.description: Optional: limit scans to specific PipeWarden connection ID

scan_type.description: Scan type: heuristic (fast), ai (smart), dlp (secrets), or all

group_by_pipeline.description: Group findings by pipeline in notifications

scan_results.description: Complete scan results with findings and risk scores

notification_status.description: Status of notification delivery across all channels

execution_summary.description: Summary of scan execution: pipelines scanned, findings detected, execution time
